feat.name: Channeling Block
feat.text: You pour divine energy into a desperate block. When you Shield Block, you can expend a harm or heal spell. Roll 1d8 for each rank of the spell, and increase the shield’s Hardness by the total for this block.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.
